category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an Emacs-style editor with vi-like memory, CPU, and size requirements; official repository describes it as Jonathan's Own Version of Emacs.
display_name_sources: Official repository title/README uses JOVE as the project name.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents build, install, features, and manual locations.
Official repository doc directory contains the manual files and quick reference noted by the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/jonmacs/jove; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository README says JOVE is a fast, small Emacs clone and mentions manuals and teachjove tutorial.
